mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM sku WHERE code = #{code}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sku (id, code, name, description, unit_of_measure, version) VALUES (#{row.id}, #{row.code}, #{row.name}, #{row.description}, #{row.unitOfMeasure}, #{row.version})
mapper.update: UPDATE sku SET code = #{row.code}, name = #{row.name}, description = #{row.description}, unit_of_measure = #{row.unitOfMeasure}, version = #{row.version}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{row.id} AND version = #{expectedVersion}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sku WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{expectedVersion}
